## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / aarch64]
- Python: [e.g. 3.12.3]
- Pangu version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Installation method: [e.g. pip install -e .]

## Logs / Traceback
```
paste here
```

## Severity
- [ ] P0 - data loss / security / blocker
- [ ] P1 - core feature broken
- [ ] P2 - workaround exists
- [ ] P3 - cosmetic / minor

## Possible cause
If you have any insights, share them.
